◎简　　介  

　　Devon Ke Dev...Mahadev is a Hindu spiritual television drama series which airs on Life OK channel. It premiered on 18 December, 2011 and showcases the story of Lord Shiva, also called as Mahadev.The drama is inspired by the works of Devdutt Pattanaik.
